name: Newmarket Gold Inc.
description: Newmarket Gold Inc. was a Canadian-listed gold mining and exploration company that operated three 100%-owned underground gold mines in Australia, including the Fosterville, Stawell, and Cosmo gold mines. Formed through a transformational merger with Crocodile Gold in 2015, the company focused on generating significant shareholder value through high-quality gold production exceeding 200,000 ounces annually, maintaining a strong free cash flow, and managing a substantial resource base. Newmarket Gold was subsequently acquired by Kirkland Lake Gold Ltd. in 2016, consolidating its assets into a larger global gold production portfolio.
